refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and testability for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are critical for safety and operational planning.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through simulation and field tests that the system correctly identifies terrain types, detects obstacles, and generates an accurate work-zone map consistent with ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone including boundaries and operational zones.

candidate_dps: DP1: Terrain analysis algorithm using sensor fusion.
DP2: Obstacle detection algorithm using LIDAR and camera data.
DP3: Work-zone mapping and representation data structure.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to fulfill the sub-FRs with modular algorithms and data structures.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
Shared data structures for work-zone representation.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically decoupled with well-defined data interfaces, minimizing coupling risks.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for terrain and obstacle detection.
Risk of algorithm performance degradation in adverse weather or lighting conditions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor data quality and consider fallback strategies for degraded conditions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Implements the integrated worksite mapping and modeling functions including terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams (LIDAR, cameras, GPS) for analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite maps and models to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the mapping function is core to NGHE; low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation.
Low containment; mapping logic spread here would increase diffusion and complicate updates.
Minimal containment; teleoperation should consume mapping data, not implement it.
Some containment possible if safety uses mapping data, but implementation here would increase diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the worksite mapping functions within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and maintenance.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottlenecks if NGHE Solution module becomes too large.
Dependency on telemetry data availability and quality.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure modular internal design within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and maintain performance.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by the selected DPs with clear logical mappings and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk due to centralized implementation in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests using telemetry inputs and output map validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor module complexity within NGHE Solution to avoid performance degradation.
Plan fallback strategies for sensor data quality issues.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements with acceptable risk and architectural clarity. No further decomposition needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone including boundaries and operational zones.

revise.why: Current artifacts satisfy criteria; focus can shift to implementation and verification.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and timely.
NGHE Solution module can handle computational load.
open_risks: Potential performance bottlenecks in centralized module.
evidence_needed: Field test results validating terrain and obstacle detection accuracy.
Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution module.
